title: kelleria dieffenbachii var. lyallii
intro: Kelleria dieffenbachii var. lyallii, also known as the Lyall's Kelleria, is a flowering plant species within the family Cunoniaceae. It is native to New Zealand and is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Kelleria dieffenbachii plant. The medicinal properties of Kelleria dieffenbachii var. lyallii are not well-documented, however, its potential health benefits may include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. As more research is needed, herbal preparations of this plant are not widely available or recognized, and its uses are primarily limited to traditional and indigenous knowledge.
